content.en:
In order to prevent some domain ancestors from hiding, Ye Tian used the replication talent to cover the probe and confirm that all the domain ancestors were dead, and then he breathed a sigh of relief.

In addition, Ye Tian and many domain ancestors took action together, completely destroyed the ship, and banished the fragments into the Dark Forbidden Void.

Moreover, Ye Tian asked the Domain Ancestors to bring all the treasures on the Dark Destruction Domain Ancestors that they had killed into the Battle Realm Tower to trade, and none of them were allowed to stay.

In case any domain ancestor carries a treasure that can be located, it will be troublesome.

Therefore, to ensure safety, all of them must be traded and forcibly executed by Ye Tian, if anyone does not do it, they will be enemies of him.

Under Ye Tian's coercion, these domain ancestors naturally did not dare to disobey.

And Ye Tian also entered the Dark Forbidden Domain, found his lost Forbidden Yuan Blade, and retrieved it.

However, this is not the end of the matter.

Ye Tian didn't dare to guarantee that the original Devouring Clan was dead, or that the Dark Destruction Domain's evil clans did not have the coordinates of the Dao Mountain Realm.

Of course, it's not impossible to solve it.

"If you make them believe that the Dao Mountain Realm has been destroyed, then it's no problem!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

But how can they make those evil clans in the Dark Destruction Domain think that the Dao Mountain Realm has been destroyed, and they won't investigate the fall of the six holy sons?

There is only one way, and that is to let one of the Sons go back.

"Copy the body!"

Ye Tian thought of a way, if he copied the body of one of the Holy Sons, he could impersonate that Holy Son to enter the Dark Destruction Domain.

This method also has a flaw, that is, he does not have any memory of a holy son, which is a loophole, but it is not a big problem.

It's a big deal, he copied the body of one of the Holy Sons, and then attacked the soul of the copied body, so that the soul was confused, and then opened the gate of time and space to return to the dark destruction domain.

When the time comes, he can excuse it as memory disorder, so his memory is lost, and he doesn't know anyone, and it's normal.

Anyway, the copy body, soul and body and even strength are exactly the same, even if the Supreme Domain Ancestor probes, it is difficult to find out any clues.

When the soul memory is restored, he will also be able to understand some of the situation in general and will not reveal his identity.

There is also a problem, that is, Ye Tian's cultivation is only an ordinary domain ancestor, and those six holy sons are top domain ancestors.

His strength is stronger than those six holy sons, and the ability to copy the body of the talent can be seen as not strength, but cultivation, and in the end, he can only copy the body of an ordinary domain ancestor, and there is no way to copy the body of the top domain ancestor.

Unless he raised his cultivation to the top Domain Ancestor level, he would be able to replicate the body of any of the six Holy Sons.

If it was someone else, there would definitely be no way, but Ye Tian knew the secret technique of temporarily improving cultivation, only improving cultivation, but not improving combat effectiveness.

This kind of secret technique is very weak, it is just bluffing, and it will even affect one's combat power.

But for Ye Tian, such a secret technique is very useful, it can be combined with the ability to copy the body, so as to copy the body of some strong people.

This kind of secret technique was seen by Ye Tian in the War Domain Realm Library Pavilion of the Battle Gate, and it was deliberately a little worse at that time, and now it can be used.

Of course, this kind of secret technique would at most raise his cultivation to the level of the top domain ancestor, and he would not be able to cross to the level of the supreme domain ancestor.

But, that's enough!

"If you destroy a realm, you can condense the destruction crystal, and if you don't have the destruction crystal, there is no way to convince the evil clan that the Daoshan realm has been destroyed. "

How to condense the Destruction Crystal?

Ye Tian suddenly thought of the Divine Heaven Realm, the Divine Heaven Realm was about to be destroyed, if the Divine Heaven Realm was destroyed, it would also be an opportunity to condense the Destruction Crystal.

In other words, he could have waited until the Divine Heaven Realm fell into the Great Destruction of the Realm, and then took the opportunity to condense the Destruction Crystal.

And the secret technique of condensing the destruction crystal, those holy sons have it, and it is also the condensation method of the top-level destruction crystal.

"It would have taken a long time for the Dark Forbidden Domain to travel, and it was normal for the Six Great Holy Sons to have been training in the Dark Forbidden Domain for tens of millions or even hundreds of millions of years, so in a short period of time, it was impossible for the Dark Destruction Domain to investigate the disappearance of the Six Great Holy Sons. So, I still have plenty of time!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After communicating with the Ten Thousand Realm Domain Ancestors, Ye Tiancai roughly confirmed the time when the Divine Heaven Realm fell into great destruction, and there were about 100 million years left.

100 million years is a long time for ordinary people, but for the domain ancestors, it is just a small retreat, which is a very short time.

But in reality, the Divine Heaven Realm may not be able to last for 100 million years.

Because the closer you get to the time of the great destruction of the realm, the realm will attract some forbidden creatures, and these forbidden creatures will rush into the realm to destroy, and many of these forbidden creatures will also devour living beings and destroy everything, and the behavior seems to be similar to that of the Destruction Holy Clan and the Three Thousand Evil Clans of the Dark Destruction Domain.

It is rumored that the Dark Destruction Domain is also inhabited by some powerful forbidden creatures, and they have taken refuge in the Dark Destruction Domain, just as the Forbidden Holy Gate can survive in the Dark Destruction Domain.

The destruction of these forbidden creatures will accelerate the decay and extinction of the realm.

As for why the forbidden creatures were attracted when the realm was about to collapse, it was because in normal times, the origin of the realm was very strong, and it was naturally repulsive to forbidden creatures, so few forbidden creatures dared to approach the Dark Destruction Domain.

This is also the reason why the creatures in the realm rarely see forbidden creatures.

This is also a kind of protection for the creatures in the realm, otherwise if the forbidden creatures enter the realm casually, how the creatures in the realm will grow up will be dead a long time ago.

The same is true of the forbidden creature that the Feather Domain Ancestor subdued, he usually doesn't dare to stay in the realm for long, and most of the time he still wanders around the dark forbidden realm outside the realm, flying around the realm.

"In less than 100 million years, at most 50 million years, the Divine Heaven Realm is afraid that it will fall into great destruction. At my current speed, it would take about 100,000 years to rush to the Divine Heaven Realm. Ye Tian estimated.

He was not in a hurry to go to the Divine Heaven Realm first, and after cultivating for a period of time, he would go to the Divine Heaven Realm as the Son of the Dead Universe.

The reason why he uses the identity of the Dead Son is because the Dead Son is in charge of the time and space key, so he must also open the time and space key as the Dead Son of the Dead Universe, so as not to make the Demon Prison Clan suspicious.

--------------------

In the following days, Ye Tian began to retreat and cultivate.

He did not go to the Elite Domain Ancestor Realm, but comprehended the Holy Technique, cultivated the Eternal Immortal Holy Body, and refined the soul.

And just like that, 30 million years passed.
